message:
fix: align http.py LIKE escaping with app.py using '!' instead of backslash

Backslash escaping in SQLite LIKE clauses is ambiguous because backslash
is not the default ESCAPE character. Switch to '!' which matches the
implementation already used in app.py, ensuring consistent behavior
across both transports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
